creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Super cool!  I like it!

Here are some things to check:

 - please set MAINTAINER, preferably to your own email address
 - you forgot to install the ipp-usb rc.d script
 - the order of variables is incorrect, please check with portlint or use
   portfmt to format your port
 - your patch file is lacking a time stamp.  Use make makepatch to regenerate
   it in the correct format

Please check and resubmit as needed.
